owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

authoriseContract(address).notice: Authorise another contract to call forceTerminate.         Used to allow DisputeResolution to terminate leases         after a regulator decision without requiring owner call.

checkAndExpire(uint256).notice: Check and expire a lease that has passed its end time.         Permissionless — anyone may call to trigger expiry.

createLease(uint256).notice: Create a lease record from a granted access request.         Called by the owner (NCC / backend) after LeaseGranted event.

forceTerminate(uint256).notice: Force-terminate a lease.         Callable by owner (NCC) or an authorised contract         such as DisputeResolution after a regulator decision.

releaseLease(uint256).notice: Secondary operator voluntarily releases spectrum early.
